_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Proposed acquisition of Talaroo Digital Custody Pty Ltd by Kestrel Harbour Holdings Ltd (ASX: KHH)
the transaction is not generally available information
company trading blackout applies until market announcement
no personal dealing in KHH securities or relevant crypto instruments without clearance
no material cyber incident between signing and completion
AFSL variation for digital asset custody
no public marketing of these crypto/ESG products prior to ASX release
Non‑Binding Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Talaroo Digital Custody Pty Ltd by Kestrel Harbour Holdings Ltd (ASX: KHH).

Transaction: Buyer to acquire 100% of Talaroo Digital Custody Pty Ltd for AUD 48m upfront cash plus up to AUD 12m earn‑out over 24 months linked to AUM of tokenised climate certificates and PoS staking revenues.

Seller discloses an April 2026 intrusion attempt on a non‑production wallet monitor (contained, no client losses) and agrees to a 12‑month cyber breach indemnity with a AUD 5m cap and escrow of AUD 3m at completion.
Exclusivity and timing: Seller grants Buyer 45 days exclusivity; long‑stop date 30 September 2026; break fee AUD 1.2m payable by Seller for wilful breach of exclusivity.

uncertain.reason: Signals deal timing/embargo-like control but not a listed embargo marker term
Ticker reference relevant to market context but not an enumerated MNPI rule
Regulatory status may be material yet no specific rule type is defined
